label: Ritual visual effect
description: Defines visual effect comps spawned during a ritual stage.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# class implementing the visual effect logic. Defaults to RitualVisualEffect.

comps.label: Comps
comps.description: List of visual effect comp property objects. Each li selects a comp class via the Class attribute.

tintColor.label: Tint color
tintColor.description: Color tint applied to all visual effect comps in this def. Defaults to white.
